label: MARD Hybrid Activity Telemetry v0.1.2
claim_limit: Contextual digital-pressure indicator only. Not attribution-grade and not sufficient to prove hybrid activity on its own.
note: v0.1.2: ThreatFox is enabled when ABUSECH_AUTH_KEY exists. ThreatFox IOC and botnet/C2 pressure now feed the HAT score; source coverage remains health context only.
